steps.title: Find the radius measure
steps.content:
The slant length $$AB=78$$, height $$h=39$$, and radius $r$ form a right triangle. Apply the Pythagorean theorem.
$$r^2=78^2-39^2=6{,}084-1{,}521=4{,}563$$

steps.title: Use cone volume
steps.content: The volume of a cone is $$\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2h$$ Substitute $$r^2=4{,}563$$ and $$h=39$$ $$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi(4{,}563)(39)$$ $$V=1{,}521(39)\pi=59{,}319\pi$$ The answer is 59319.
